title: coleataenia scabrida
intro: Coleataenia scabrida is a type of flowering plant, commonly known as Rough Prairie Cucumber, which belongs to the family Apiaceae. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its seeds and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Coleataenia scabrida include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Coleataenia scabrida often involve infusing the seeds or roots in hot water to create a tea, or using the plant's leaves to make a poultice for topical application.
